title: Vaccine Storage and Handling Resources | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
Do you know how to protect your vaccines during equipment failures, power outages, or natural disasters? This document illustrates how to pack refrigerated vaccines during emergencies to prevent compromising vaccine storage conditions and damage to your vaccine supply.
Packing Vaccines for Transport During Emergencies 
Transporting Vaccines at Refrigerated Temperatures 
This temperature log can be used to track temperatures when transporting refrigerated vaccines.
Transportation Temperature Log 
Disposal And Vaccine Wastage 
Information to help providers and immunization managers in COVID-19 vaccination programs identify, handle, dispose of, and report COVID-19 vaccine waste.
Identifying, Disposing, and Reporting COVID-19 Vaccine Wastage 
This fact sheet reinforces how to protect yourself from needlestick injuries while administering COVID-19 vaccines or helping at vaccination sites.
Safe and Proper Sharps Disposal During the COVID-19 Mass Vaccination Campaign 
Web-based Training Courses 
An interactive, web-based module which provides learning opportunities, self-test practice questions, reference and resource materials, and an extensive glossary. Continuing education credit is available.
You Call the Shots: Vaccine Storage and Handling Module 
This one-hour web-on-demand video provides comprehensive recommendations and best practices on vaccine storage and handling.
Pink Boo
